items.name_en: 🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Burgundy/Golden Vintage
items.name_cn:
🌈Premium Exclusive🔥Burgundy/Golden Vintage
▪ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New Arrival, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's explodingly popular shoulder bag is finally here from Y!! The bag has a simple, structured silhouette, looking structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish 👍
Model: 713938 [Original Leather]
Size: 22x22x10cm

items.name_en: 🌟🌟🌟CHANEL 22bag mini	It's so cool~ it's my favorite, just browsing... completely want to buy a bag, eye-catching, must grab it haha! The SA was very nice. Chanel patent calfskin paired with vintage hardware, quilted, the mini 22bag is more refined than the larger size. The chain design is so Coco, double chains ⛓➕ leather strap chains ⛓, full of details. Tighten and open the bag using the two short leather chains on the front, the two long shoulder straps on the back are purely for carrying.

items.name_en: 🌟Double Handle Handbag
items.name_cn:
🌟Double Handle Handbag
Featuring elegant and simple design with distinctive noble patent leather➕imported nylon fabric. Classic logo on the front with a gold triangle emblem. Long handles for hand or shoulder carry. Features three compartments to meet exquisite storage needs.
Size: 30×17.5×9cm
Style No.: 1BB115

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 🌟Double Handle Handbag (Large)
items.name_cn:
🌟Double Handle Handbag (Large)
Made from recycled nylon, incorporating unique style elements, paired with exquisite Saffiano leather details, completely subverting traditional perceptions of luxury. Adds a unique charm between practical design and exquisite details.
Size: L35xH21.5xW10cm
Style No.: 1BB114

items.name_en: 🌟Glossy Flap Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
🌟Glossy Flap Shoulder Bag
Distinctive noble patent calf leather, exquisite and fashionable new lock closure. The large logo triangle emblem is perfectly integrated into the bag body. Comes with 2 detachable and adjustable shoulder straps, can be used as a shoulder bag or adjusted to a crossbody bag. Smooth and sharp lines, retro yet trendy! Perfect details comparable to the real thing👍🏻
Size: 24×11×4cm
Style No.: 1BD345

items.name_cn:
🌟Hobo 3-in-1 (Full Leather)
Includes detachable P. Re-Edition 2005 Saffiano leather nameplate with keychain, detachable adjustable logo fabric shoulder strap, detachable zippered leather pouch, detachable metal chain shoulder strap. Multiple carrying styles. Top zipper closure. Nylon lining. Enamel triangle metal logo!
Size: 22x18x6.5CM
Model: 1BH204

items.name_en: 🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
items.name_cn:
🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
Shining on the fashion stage, the Kangpeng Mimi basket bag is a stunning sight, attracting everyone's attention. Various classic colorways are timeless legends in the fashion world. Their collision on this handbag shows a simple yet powerful beauty. Kangpeng series' unique material gives the bag a soft touch and tough quality. Exquisite, cute, and practical. It can easily hold your phone, wallet, lipstick, and other small items while staying stylish. The handbag design makes you carry it with elegance and composure. Whether paired with casual jeans or a glamorous evening gown, it blends perfectly and adds to your overall look. Choosing the black and white Kangpeng mini basket bag means choosing a unique fashion attitude that makes you stand out.
Size: 20x16x7cm
